because.text: Both conditional P0 candidates resolve to already-sealed: discarded-unresolvable-branch is pinned by EV-K-DEAD-MISSING (the reviewer's exact term, K I <absent> -> I, spent 7) plus EV-K-DEAD-NESTED-MISSING and EV-S-KI-KK-DEAD-Z (S-duplicated dead ghost); dangling-result is pinned by EV-TV8-MISSING-CHILD, which also corrects the reviewer's prediction: the root result is always demanded, so APPLY(I,<absent>) remains Unresolved Reference (spent 4) under lazy evaluation - a dangling hash can never escape as a normal form. Settled point added to reviews/README.md; check tools/check_lazy_edges.py re-verifies both edges and the full 46-vector suite.

subject.note: Peer-Claude post-release review of v0.5.0: lazy-evaluation edge coverage (2 conditional P0)
